### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] UI/UX improvement

## Testing
<!-- Describe the testing you've performed -->

### Manual Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tested on desktop browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices (iOS Safari, Android Chrome)
- [ ] Tested with different screen sizes
- [ ] Tested user authentication flows
- [ ] Tested order placement flow
- [ ] Tested payment processing (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested error handling scenarios
- [ ] Tested loading states
- [ ] Tested empty states

### Automated Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] TypeScript compilation succeeds
- [ ] ESLint checks pass
- [ ] No console errors or warnings

### Performance Testing
- [ ] Page load times are acceptable
- [ ] Bundle size impact assessed
- [ ] Memory usage is reasonable
- [ ] No performance regressions identified

## Review Instructions
1. **Setup**: Checkout this branch and run `npm install`
2. **Environment**: Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and configure
3. **Testing**: Run `npm run dev` and test the changes
4. **Focus Areas**: Pay special attention to [specific areas]

## Post-Merge Actions
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Notify stakeholders
- [ ] Monitor for issues
- [ ] Update project board/tracking
